name: Boya BY-WM3T-U2 Wireless Microphone System with USB-C Connector
description: The BY-WM3T-U2 is an ultra-compact 2.4GHz wireless microphone system, ideal for content creation, livestreaming, vlogging, and various other applications. It features two transmitters and one USB-C receiver, ensuring compatibility with Android phones, tablets, and other USB-C devices.

features.Key Features:: 2.4GHz dual-channel wireless microphone system | Ultracompact and portable | Compatible with devices with USB-C ports | Omnidirection built-in mic for 360° sound pickup | Selectable noise cancellation | Automatic pairing & plug and play | RXU’s Type-C port supports charging for external | devices during use | TX’s built-in rechargeable battery provides | up to 10-hour runtime | Up to 100m wireless operating range
